items.title: UX/UI Design
items.description: I design complete systems, not just screens. From user flows and component libraries to final handoff, connecting design decisions with real product needs.

items.title: Frontend & Web
items.description: Pixel-perfect interfaces that perform. I build responsive and accessible web apps with React, Next.js and TypeScript, covering everything from design system to production.

items.title: Mobile Development
items.description: Cross-platform mobile apps for real-world products. From architecture and UI to product decisions, I take ideas from concept to production, with experience shipping to the App Store and Google Play.

items.title: Backend & Databases
items.description: Strong backend and database foundations. I design secure and scalable systems with a focus on long-term maintainability, edge cases, and real product requirements.
